title: Graphistylis toledoi
taxonomy: Graphistylis toledoi is classified within the family Asteraceae. This classification places it in the order Asterales and in the phylum Angiosperms. Additionally, it is classified as a species within the genus Graphistylis. The classification of Graphistylis toledoi is further detailed at the rank of species, where it is designated as Graphistylis toledoi (Humbert) Cuatrec.

intro: Graphistylis toledoi is a medicinal plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Graphistylis toledoi include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
